top_signals.title: Markets Shift Focus From SpaceX to Iran, Fed | Open Interest 6/15/2026
top_signals.summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Stocks surge and oil plunges as the US and Iran strike a deal, but key questions remain to be answered. Fox makes a big bet on streaming, buying Roku in a $22 billion deal. On the markets, Infrastructure Capital Advisors CEO Jay Hatfield raises his year-end S&P 500 target to 9,000. Redwire CEO discusses the rapidly expanding space economy following SpaceX's blockbuster debut. Plus, Ivanhoe Electric CEO Taylor Melvin on the outlook for copper as the US-Iran deal removes a key risk for commodity markets. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Citadel Securities Warns Higher Rates to Challenge Risk Assets
top_signals.summary: Risk assets are headed for turbulence as the Federal Reserve edges toward a potential interest-rate hiking cycle and investors grow more discerning about the economic impact of artificial intelligence, according to Citadel Securities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nvidia Set to Sell $25 Billion of Bonds, Joining AI Debt Boom
top_signals.summary: Chipmaking giant Nvidia Corp. is set to raise $25 billion from a high-grade bond sale that received more than three times that amount in demand, underscoring relentless investor appetite for exposure to the artificial intelligence boom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: How Israel’s ‘trampoline’ economy has adapted to war - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: How Israel’s ‘trampoline’ economy has adapted to war  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Case Against Government Buying Into the AI Giants
top_signals.summary: When Bernie Sanders and Donald Trump agree on something, that agreement deserves examination. Both are touting the idea that the federal government should have an ownership stake in major artificial intelligence (AI) companies. For Sanders, this would be a way for the American people to share in the wealth generated by AI companies that those companies accumulated through the theft of other people's writing, artworks, photos, videos, and recordings. And it would give the government a seat at the table as a representative of the public in deciding…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Arson targeting Keir Starmer properties originated in Russia
top_signals.summary: Handler was affiliated with a pro-Kremlin hacktivist group
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘There’s room for win-win outcomes’: Largest Solana treasury firm Forward looks to acquire smaller SOL DATs
top_signals.summary: Forward Industries is offering to acquire Solana DAT competitors at a premium as their mNAVs slip along with the declining price of SOL.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fox to buy streaming device maker Roku for $22 billion
top_signals.summary: Fox, the owner of the news and sports networks, said it has reached a deal to acquire Roku for about $22 billion in enterprise value.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bankruptcy admin approves settlement fund of $47 million for 23andMe data breach victims
top_signals.summary: About 7 million customers of the genetics testing company had their data stolen by hackers starting in April 2023, and many had their information posted on the dark web.
